name: moba-status-bar
description: CPU, GPU, memory, disk, and network usage monitor with a compact trend graph in the VS Code status bar.

commands.title: Moba Status Bar: Show Top CPU Processes
Moba Status Bar: Show Top Memory Processes
Moba Status Bar: Configure GPU Display

mobaStatusBar.cpuEnabled.description: Enable CPU monitoring. When disabled, CPU sampling and CPU trend history are not collected.

mobaStatusBar.cpuWarningThresholdPercent.description: Show a warning background when CPU usage is at or above this percentage.

mobaStatusBar.showCpuTrendGraph.description: Show a compact CPU usage trend graph in the status bar.

mobaStatusBar.cpuTrendGraphLength.description: Number of samples shown in the CPU trend graph.

mobaStatusBar.memoryEnabled.description: Enable memory monitoring. When disabled, memory usage is not sampled.

mobaStatusBar.memoryWarningThresholdPerc.description: Show a warning background when memory usage is at or above this percentage.

mobaStatusBar.gpuEnabled.description: Enable GPU monitoring. When disabled, GPU sampling is not collected.

enumDescriptions: Use Windows typeperf.exe. This is the default and avoids PowerShell CPU spikes. If typeperf.exe is unavailable, the GPU status item stays hidden.
Use PowerShell Get-Counter. This can show GPU data on systems without typeperf.exe, but may create noticeable CPU spikes while sampling.
mobaStatusBar.windowsGpuBackend.description: Windows GPU sampling backend. If the GPU item does not appear with the default Typeperf backend, typeperf.exe may be unavailable; choose PowerShell only if you accept its higher CPU cost.

mobaStatusBar.gpuWarningThresholdPercent.description: Show a warning background when GPU usage is at or above this percentage.

mobaStatusBar.diskEnabled.description: Enable disk monitoring. When disabled, disk usage is not sampled.

mobaStatusBar.diskWarningThresholdPercen.description: Show a warning background when disk usage is at or above this percentage.

mobaStatusBar.networkEnabled.description: Enable network monitoring. Disabled by default so the network item stays hidden unless you opt in.

mobaStatusBar.showNetworkUpload.description: Show upload speed alongside download speed in the network status bar item.

mobaStatusBar.refreshIntervalMs.description: How often enabled live monitors should refresh, in milliseconds.

mobaStatusBar.alignment.description: Alignment of the Moba Status Bar in the status bar.

mobaStatusBar.enabled.description: Enable the Moba Status Bar resource monitor.
